evals.prompt: I need a settings page in my Flutter app with shadcn components: cards, form fields, and a save button. Please install everything needed.
evals.expected_output: A CLI-first plan using namespace-aware discovery, dry-run, add commands for form + layout components, and post-install validation commands.
expectations: Uses flutter_shadcn discovery commands before installation (search/info or list)
Runs dry-run for selected components before add
Installs components using explicit namespace-qualified IDs

evals.prompt: Add dialog and popover from whichever registry has them. I don't care which.
evals.expected_output: A response that clarifies or chooses namespace deterministically, uses explicit @namespace/component IDs, checks overlays, and applies safe install workflow.
expectations: Uses explicit namespace strategy instead of ambiguous unqualified IDs
Uses dry-run before add to surface dependencies
Mentions overlay wrapper requirements for overlay-dependent components
Uses add with qualified component refs

evals.prompt: Apply a custom theme JSON and then verify nothing broke in the registry setup.
evals.expected_output: A sequence using global --experimental theme apply-file/apply-url and verification via doctor/validate/audit/deps.
expectations: Runs validate --json and audit --json after updates
Suggests sync when config or theme paths changed
